rationale: Both correctly surface the missed diffusion-transformer caller of get_cache_scale, hitting the latent gap. Y grounds its analysis in actual upstream vLLM source (exact file:line citations in utils.py/weight_utils.py/fp8.py) to validate the design and lands on the correct approve/merge verdict, and it also catches a genuine, novel test-quality bug the humans missed (the delegated-loader test bypasses AutoWeightsLoader so never exercises the mapping it claims to verify). X pads its report with two low-value comment nitpicks and overstates severity by calling the unswept diffusion loader a 'blocker', when ground truth indicates that file was coordinated via a separate PR (#4808), hurting precision relative to Y.
